title: DC Cryogenic Modeling of Open-Source SkyWater 130 nm MOSFETs at 77 K Using BSIM4
summary: Cryogenic applications in high-energy physics (HEP) demand reliable, low-power CMOS electronics capable of operating at liquid nitrogen temperatures (77 K). The open-source SkyWater 130nm (SKY130) CMOS process has previously been shown to operate at temperatures as low as 4 K making it a promising candidate for HEP applications. In this work, we characterize and model SKY130 low-threshold voltage transistors at 77 K, which is a temperature commonly used in modeling applications for liquid argon detectors. DC characteristic measurements were performed at both room temperature and liquid nitrogen temperature. We created a cryogenic modeling approach to produce a SPICE-compatible, isothermal BSIM4-based model for select transistor sizes at 77 K. The resulting model agrees with data at 77 K with an average error on the order of 20% (relative RMS) and shows no dependence on drain voltage. Due to the open-source nature of SKY130, we have made our models publicly available on Github. We hope this work will continue the trend for democratizing circuit design at cryogenic temperatures in high-energy physics by enabling open access to accurate cryogenic CMOS device models at 77 K.

AI.tldr: 本文在SkyWater 130nm CMOS工艺上，针对液氮温度（77K）下的低阈值电压晶体管进行了特性表征与建模，开发了基于BSIM4的SPICE兼容模型，平均误差约20%，并将模型开源在GitHub上。
AI.motivation: 高能物理中的低温应用（如液氩探测器）需要在77K温度下可靠、低功耗的CMOS电子器件，而SkyWater 130nm工艺已被证明可在低至4K工作，因此需要针对77K进行精确建模以支持液氩探测器等应用。
AI.method: 在室温和液氮温度下对SKY130低阈值电压晶体管进行DC特性测量，开发了一种低温建模方法，生成基于BSIM4的等温SPICE兼容模型，并公开在GitHub上。
AI.result: 模型与77K下的实测数据吻合，平均相对RMS误差约20%，且误差与漏极电压无关。
AI.conclusion: 该开源模型可推动高能物理领域低温电路设计的民主化，使研究者能开放获取准确的77K CMOS器件模型。

title: Novel dynamics for an inertial polar tracer in an active bath
summary: A polar tracer immersed in an active bath is known to be propelled forward and therefore activated. Here we report that the induced dynamics of an inertial tracer can be much richer than expected. We investigate a heavy polar tracer immersed in a bath of independent active Brownian particles. Using the projection-operator formalism to integrate out the bath, we show that the tracer's reduced dynamics can be mapped to a stochastic Lorenz equation. According to the attractors in the Lorenz equation, the tracer motion is classified into several different dynamical regimes, including active Brownian motion, chiral active Brownian motion, complex chaotic motion, and zigzag active Brownian motion. For certain regimes, we derive analytical expressions for the propulsion speed, the velocity covariance, and the effective diffusion coefficient. Numerical simulations corroborate these theoretical predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了重极性示踪剂在活性粒子浴中的动力学行为，发现其运动可映射为随机洛伦兹方程，展现出多种复杂动力学模式，包括活性布朗运动、手性活性布朗运动、混沌运动和锯齿状活性布朗运动。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅关注极性示踪剂在活性浴中的前向推进，忽略了惯性示踪剂可能展现的丰富动力学行为。作者旨在揭示惯性效应下示踪剂运动的复杂性和多样性。
AI.method: 采用投影算子形式化方法将活性浴粒子积分掉，推导出示踪剂的约化动力学方程，并将其映射为随机洛伦兹方程。通过分析洛伦兹吸引子分类不同运动模式，并推导推进速度、速度协方差和有效扩散系数的解析表达式。通过数值模拟验证理论预测。
AI.result: 发现了四种动力学模式：活性布朗运动、手性活性布朗运动、复杂混沌运动、锯齿状活性布朗运动。给出了各模式下推进速度、速度协方差和有效扩散系数的解析表达式，数值模拟与理论预测一致。
AI.conclusion: 重极性示踪剂在活性浴中的运动比预期更丰富，映射到洛伦兹方程揭示了不同动力学状态。该工作为理解惯性活性系统提供了新的理论框架。

title: Data-Driven Thermal and Mechanical Modeling of Defective Covalent Organic Frameworks
summary: Covalent Organic Frameworks (COFs) are versatile two-dimensional (2D) materials for flexible electronics, catalysis, and sensing, owing to their tunable architectures and large surface areas. However, like most materials, COFs inevitably contain synthesis-induced defects, which-similar to graphene-can strongly influence intrinsic properties, such as thermal transport and mechanical strength. To address this challenge, we have assessed the performance of a set of machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIP) capable of efficient large-scale simulations of COFs with quantum accuracy. In doing so, QCOF models (Quantum COF) were developed by tuning the state-of-the-art MACE architecture on an extensive dataset of non-equilibrium COF conformations generated from high-fidelity density functional theory calculations. The accuracy, computational efficiency, memory footprint, and transferability to unseen chemical environments of these models were benchmarked against general-purpose MACE models and their fine-tuned variants. Our results show that an invariant QCOF model with a small descriptor dimensionality and cutoff outperforms all other models in most validation tasks, including scalability to large systems, force prediction in defective COFs, and phonon dispersion calculations. The best-performing QCOF model was then used to run large-scale simulations of thermal conductivity for defective CTF-1 and COF-LZU1 systems via non-equilibrium MD, revealing a more pronounced sensitivity of CTF-1 to structural defects. Stress-strain curves were also investigated, showing that the mechanical response remains nearly invariant at low defect densities, while asymmetric behaviour emerges at large strains. This work thus provides a foundation for the design of robust quantum-informed MLIP for large-scale property simulations of defective of extended network materials.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了QCOF模型（基于MACE架构的机器学习原子间势），用于高效大规模模拟含缺陷的共价有机框架材料。结果表明，小描述符维度和截断半径的不变QCOF模型在力预测、声子色散和热导率模拟中表现最优，揭示了CTF-1对结构缺陷更敏感，以及低缺陷密度下力学响应近乎不变但大应变下出现非对称行为。
AI.motivation: COFs在合成过程中不可避免地产生缺陷，这些缺陷会显著影响其热输运和力学强度等本征性质。然而传统方法难以高效且精确地模拟含缺陷的大规模COF体系，因此需要开发具有量子精度的机器学习原子间势。
AI.method: 基于MACE架构，通过密度泛函理论生成的非平衡COF构象数据集，微调开发了QCOF模型。对比评估了通用MACE模型及其微调变体在精度、计算效率、内存占用和可迁移性方面的表现。
AI.result: 小描述符维度和截断半径的不变QCOF模型在大部分验证任务中表现最佳，包括大规模可扩展性、缺陷COF的力预测和声子色散计算。热导率模拟显示CTF-1对缺陷更敏感，力学测试发现低缺陷密度下响应几乎不变，高应变下出现非对称行为。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为含缺陷扩展网络材料的大规模性质模拟提供了量子信息驱动的鲁棒MLIP基础，有助于指导COFs材料的理性设计。

title: Decomposing Fractional Quantum Hall Wave Functions via Operator Contraction Multiplication
summary: We develop a general algebraic scheme to decompose fractional quantum Hall (FQH) wave functions based on the operator contraction multiplication. By introducing fermionic and bosonic operators and establishing three fundamental contraction rules, we achieve an exact decomposition of Laughlin states. This approach naturally extends to multi-component systems by factorizing coupled Jastrow factors via resultants and elementary symmetric polynomials, enabling the first complete decomposition of Halperin states. For Halperin ($2,2,1$) state, we explicitly derive its basic expansion, identify root configurations, and reveal intra- and inter-color squeezing operators, thereby uncovering the underlying generalized Pauli principle. Using this method, we compute orbital entanglement spectra for up to $16$ particles with decomposition dimensions exceeding $10^{11}$, obtaining edge excitation sequences that precisely match chiral Luttinger liquid theory. Our framework breaks through the longstanding limitations of Jack polynomials, provides a unified decomposition for both single- and multi-component FQH states, and opens a new avenue for exploring wave functions for more complex FQH states.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于算符收缩乘法的代数方案，实现了分数量子霍尔（FQH）波函数的精确分解。该方法自然推广到多组分系统，首次完成Halperin态的完全分解，并可用于计算多达16个粒子的轨道纠缠谱，突破了Jack多项式长期存在的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有Jack多项式方法在处理多组分FQH态时存在局限性，无法有效分解Halperin态等复杂波函数，因此需要发展一种更通用的代数分解方案。
AI.method: 通过引入费米子和玻色子算符，建立三种基本收缩规则，实现Laughlin态的精确分解；利用结式和初等对称多项式分解耦合Jastrow因子，将方法推广到多组分系统，完成Halperin态的分解。
AI.result: 对Halperin (2,2,1)态给出了基本展开式，识别了根构型，揭示了颜色内和颜色间的挤压算符，发现了广义Pauli原理。计算了多达16个粒子的轨道纠缠谱，分解维度超过10^11，得到的边缘激发序列与手征Luttinger液体理论精确匹配。
AI.conclusion: 该框架突破了Jack多项式的长期限制，为单组分和多组分FQH态提供了统一的分解方案，为探索更复杂FQH态的波函数开辟了新途径。

title: Velocity-field characteristics and device performance in nanoscale amorphous oxide Thin-Film-Transistors
summary: The electron velocity-electric field characteristics in short channel length (50-100 nm) amorphous oxide field-effect transistors (FETs) are described using measured experimental data from indium gallium zinc oxide (IGZO) FETs in conjunction with a physics-based model. Such understanding is crucial for the design of FETs for emerging applications such as in back-end-of-line circuitry for advanced memories and artificial intelligence hardware. In such semiconductor systems, there is an interplay between trapping and extended state (band) transport that has to be considered in detail for a more complete physical understanding of device operation. The approach described in this paper demonstrates such a method and its use for an exemplary semiconductor IGZO. It can be used in many emerging thin-film semiconductors, including several amorphous oxide semiconductors. The carrier mobility is calculated for dominant scattering mechanisms such as trapped carrier scattering and optical phonon scattering. The carrier velocity is computed from the mobility using a modified Caughey-Thomas equation. The physical model considers contact resistance, Joule heating, and electric-field-induced carrier heating, all of which are very important in small geometry FETs. The carrier velocity exhibits a tendency to saturate at high electric fields and reaches values > 2*10^6 cm/s when averaged over all induced carriers (both trapped and in the band) and > 4*10^6 cm/s for carriers in the band.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验数据与物理模型结合，研究了短沟道（50-100 nm）非晶氧化物FET中电子速度-电场特性，发现载流子速度在高电场下趋于饱和，带内载流子速度超过4×10^6 cm/s。
AI.motivation: 理解短沟道非晶氧化物FET中电子速度-电场特性，对于后端电路、先进存储器和AI硬件等新兴应用中的FET设计至关重要。
AI.method: 基于IGZO FET实测数据，结合物理模型，考虑陷阱态与扩展态（能带）传输的相互作用，计算陷阱载流子散射和光学声子散射主导下的载流子迁移率，再通过修正的Caughey-Thomas方程计算载流子速度。模型还考虑了接触电阻、焦耳热和电场诱导的载流子加热效应。
AI.result: 载流子速度在高电场下呈现饱和趋势，所有诱导载流子（包括陷阱态和带内）的平均速度大于2×10^6 cm/s，带内载流子速度大于4×10^6 cm/s。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可推广至多种新兴薄膜半导体（包括非晶氧化物半导体），为短沟道FET的物理理解和器件设计提供有效工具。

title: Stable Wave-Function Zeros Indicate Exciton Topology
summary: Excitons are bound states of electrons and holes whose band topology arises from an interplay between the topology of the underlying electronic bands and the structure of the electron-hole interaction. In crystalline solids, symmetry representations and topological invariants of the conduction and valence bands constrain the structure of the exciton envelope wave function. In particular, we show that crystalline symmetry can enforce stable zeros in the exciton wave function. These occur at high-symmetry momenta, including the optically accessible total momentum p=0. We work out how the stable zeros constrain both the relative exciton-band topology (the difference of exciton and non-interacting topological invariants) and the relative band topology (the difference of valence and conduction band invariants), all without requiring detailed knowledge of the band structure or interactions. We establish these results for two-band excitons in inversion- and rotation-symmetric systems in one and two dimensions, where the relevant topological invariants are the Berry phase in one dimension and the Chern number (modulo the rotation order) in two dimensions. In two dimensions, the exciton Chern number itself can also be constrained by zero patterns.

AI.tldr: 本文研究激子（电子-空穴束缚态）的能带拓扑性质，发现晶体对称性可以在激子波函数中强制产生稳定的零点，这些零点约束了激子能带拓扑（激子与非相互作用拓扑不变量之差）和相对能带拓扑（价带与导带不变量之差）。在具有反演和旋转对称性的一维和二维系统中，建立了Berry相位和Chern数（模旋转阶数）与零点模式的关系。
AI.motivation: 激子的能带拓扑由底层电子能带拓扑和电子-空穴相互作用共同决定，但此前缺乏从对称性角度系统约束激子拓扑性质的通用框架。作者希望不依赖能带结构和相互作用的细节，仅通过晶体对称性推导激子波函数的拓扑约束。
AI.method: 利用晶体对称性分析激子包络波函数在高对称动量点的行为，证明对称性可以强制波函数出现稳定零点。通过零点的模式约束激子能带拓扑不变量（如Berry相位和Chern数）与能带拓扑不变量之差。
AI.result: 在反演和旋转对称的一维和二维系统中，激子波函数的稳定零点出现在高对称动量点（包括光学可及的总动量p=0）。这些零点严格约束了相对激子能带拓扑和相对能带拓扑。在二维中，激子Chern数本身也受到零点模式的约束。
AI.conclusion: 晶体对称性可以独立于能带结构和相互作用细节，为激子拓扑提供普适性约束。该框架为理解激子拓扑性质提供了新的对称性视角，可推广到更多维度和对称性系统。

title: Symplectic symmetry of quadratic-band-touching Hamiltonians in two dimensions
summary: The internal low-energy symmetry of the massless Lorentz-invariant Dirac Hamiltonian in $2+1$ dimensions is known to be $O(2N)$, where $N$ is the number of two-component Dirac fermions. Here we point out that there exists an analogous internal symmetry of the single-particle quadratic-band-touching Hamiltonian in two spatial dimensions, and it is the unitary symplectic group, $USp(2N)$. All fermionic bilinears belong to one of the three small irreducible representations of this group. The interacting theory that respects the $USp(2N)$ symmetry and the spatial rotations is constructed and found to allow two independent interaction terms. When these interactions are infrared-relevant the symplectic symmetry either remains preserved or becomes spontaneously broken to $USp(N) \times USp(N)$. The symmetry in the lattices such as honeycomb to infinite order in the dispersion's expansion in powers of local momentum is given by the overlap of the symplectic and the orthogonal groups. We show that this overlap is $O(2N) \bigcap USp(2N) = U(N)$.

AI.tldr: 该论文指出二维空间中的二次能带接触哈密顿量具有USp(2N)内部对称性，并分析了相互作用的对称性保持与自发破缺，以及其与正交群的重叠为U(N)。
AI.motivation: 此前已知2+1维无质量狄拉克哈密顿量具有O(2N)对称性，作者想探究二维空间中的二次能带接触系统是否存在类似的内部对称性，并揭示其与已知对称性的关系。
AI.method: 从单粒子二次能带接触哈密顿量出发，推导其内部对称性为USp(2N)；通过群论分类费米子双线性形式；构造保持USp(2N)和空间旋转对称性的相互作用理论；分析红外相关相互作用下对称性的保持与自发破缺；计算对称群在晶格（如蜂巢晶格）中的重叠，证明O(2N)∩USp(2N)=U(N)。
AI.result: 发现了二维二次能带接触哈密顿量的内部对称性为USp(2N)；费米子双线性属于该群的三个小不可约表示；相互作用理论允许两个独立项；红外相关相互作用下对称性保持或自发破缺至USp(N)×USp(N)；对称群重叠为U(N)。
AI.conclusion: 二维二次能带接触系统具有与狄拉克系统不同的内部对称性（USp(2N) vs O(2N)），这为研究新型量子临界现象和拓扑物质提供了理论基础。

title: Electrically switchable vacancy state revealed by in-operando positron experiments
summary: Whether the flash state in electrically driven solids involves non-equilibrium defect production or is accounted for by Joule heating alone has been debated since 2010. Using positron annihilation spectroscopy on copper, we observe a fully reversible, electrically switchable vacancy population: the DBS S-parameter rises above baseline whenever applied current exceeds a critical density and returns on current removal. Positron lifetime spectroscopy independently confirms open-volume defect formation and reveals a void to cluster relaxation hierarchy. The current-induced vacancy concentration exceeds the thermal-equilibrium value at 352C by > 106x, is present only while current is applied, and vanishes within minutes. The nucleation rate scales steeply with the applied current, connecting the minute-scale kinetics resolved here to the sub-second flash events observed in ceramic sintering. These results demonstrate current-induced Frenkel-pair production in a metal and identify a defect-mediated, non-equilibrium contribution to the flash state.

AI.tldr: 本文利用正电子湮没谱学在铜中发现了完全可逆、电控的空位缺陷产生与消除现象。电流超过临界密度时产生大量空位（热平衡值的10⁶倍以上），电流移除后数分钟内消失，证明电致闪速状态中除焦耳热外还存在非平衡缺陷产生机制。
AI.motivation: 自2010年以来，电驱动固体中的闪速状态（flash state）究竟是源于非平衡缺陷产生还是仅由焦耳热引起，一直存在争议。本文旨在通过实验区分这两种机制。
AI.method: 采用正电子湮没谱学（包括多普勒展宽谱DBS和正电子寿命谱）原位观测铜中电流诱导的缺陷。通过测量S参数和寿命变化，表征空位浓度及其时间演化。
AI.result: 电流超过临界密度时，DBS S参数上升，表明产生大量空位；浓度超过352°C热平衡值的10⁶倍以上。电流移除后数分钟内完全消失。空位成核速率与电流呈陡峭正比关系。发现了空位团簇（void）到更小团簇的弛豫层级结构。
AI.conclusion: 在金属中首次证明电流可直接产生弗兰克尔缺陷对（Frenkel pairs），闪速状态中存在焦耳热以外的非平衡缺陷贡献机制。这一发现将分钟级的动力学与陶瓷烧结中亚秒级闪速事件联系起来。

title: Disorder-induced crossover from phase-averaging to mode-mixing regimes in magnetic domain walls of a second-order topological insulator
summary: We investigate electronic transport across a magnetic domain wall (DW) in a three-dimensional (3D) second-order topological insulator subject to Anderson disorder. In the clean limit, the DW hosts two co-propagating one-dimensional (1D) topological edge states that act as the two arms of an effective Aharonov-Bohm (AB) interferometer, inducing a sinusoidal conductance oscillation. Upon the introduction of disorder, the AB oscillations are suppressed, while a half-quantized plateau of $0.5 e^2/h$ for the ensemble-averaged conductance emerges. Notably, within this plateau, the conductance fluctuation exhibits a distinctive two-step plateau structure, with values of $\sim 0.35 e^2/h$ at moderate disorder, followed by a second plateau at $\sim0.29 e^2/h$ under strong disorder. By developing theoretical frameworks that account for the random-phase interference and inter-mode mixing of the two arms, we identify the first fluctuation plateau as a signature of the phase-averaging regime (PAR) and the second as a signature of the mode-mixing regime (MMR). Furthermore, we show that, in the PAR the conductance follows a U-shaped beta distribution, while it evolves into a uniform distribution in the MMR. The Fano factor associated with shot noise is also computed, which exhibits a similar two-step plateau structure at $1/4$ and $1/3$, corresponding to the PAR and MMR, respectively. Our work provides a clear demonstration of the disorder-induced crossover from PAR to MMR, and highlights the crucial role of second-order conductance cumulants in identifying these transport regimes. The results suggest disorder-engineering as a powerful route for controlling electronic transport across DW-based devices.

AI.tldr: 研究了三维二阶拓扑绝缘体中磁畴壁的电子输运，发现无序诱导从相位平均区到模式混合区的交叉，表现为0.5 e²/h的半量子化电导平台及两个特征波动平台。
AI.motivation: 探索无序对三维二阶拓扑绝缘体中磁畴壁拓扑边缘态输运的影响，揭示从干净极限下Aharonov-Bohm振荡到无序诱导的不同输运区间的转变机制。
AI.method: 通过理论框架考虑随机相位干涉和两臂模式混合，分析了安德森无序下的电导统计、累积量分布以及法诺因子。
AI.result: 发现电导波动呈现双台阶结构（~0.35 e²/h和~0.29 e²/h），分别对应PAR和MMR；电导分布从U型β分布演化为均匀分布；法诺因子在PAR和MMR中分别为1/4和1/3。
AI.conclusion: 清晰展示了无序诱导的PAR到MMR的交叉，强调二阶电导累积量在识别输运区间中的关键作用，并提出无序工程可作为控制磁畴壁器件输运的有效手段。

title: Dynamical mean-field theory for dense spin systems at finite temperature
summary: In recent years, a method for computing spin dynamics at infinite temperature (spinDMFT) was developed. It utilizes the ideas of dynamical mean-field theory for fermions: single-site approximation and a self-consistency condition to approximate time-dependent spin correlations. In this work, we develop a crucial extension of the method to systems at finite temperature, able to compute imaginary-time correlations and thermodynamical quantities. We benchmark the method by comparison to results in finite-size systems, obtaining very good agreement with correlations in a random-coupling system, good agreement for a ferromagnetic system and large discrepancies in the case of an antiferromagnet. We note the appearance of ferromagnetic order in the method. We discuss possible extensions and potential applications of the approach.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了spinDMFT方法在有限温度下的扩展，能够计算虚时关联和热力学量，并通过对随机耦合系统、铁磁系统和反铁磁系统的基准测试验证了方法性能。
AI.motivation: 将原本仅适用于无限温度的自旋动力学方法（spinDMFT）扩展到有限温度系统，使其能够计算虚时关联和热力学量。
AI.method: 基于动力学平均场理论（DMFT）的思想，采用单点近似和自洽条件，将方法从无限温度扩展到有限温度情形。
AI.result: 随机耦合系统中与有限尺寸结果吻合良好；铁磁系统中一致性较好；反铁磁系统中出现较大偏差。同时观察到方法中出现了铁磁序。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在有限温度下对某些系统有效，但存在局限性（如反铁磁情况），未来可进行进一步扩展和应用。

title: Room-temperature third-order nonlinear anomalous Hall effect in ferromagnetic metal Fe3GaTe2
summary: Berry curvature, as the imaginary component of quantum geometry, plays a crucial role in condensed matter physics. The spatial distribution of Berry curvature can be characterized by its dipole and multipole moments, which can induce the nonlinear anomalous Hall effect (NLAHE). To date, the NLAHE has been demonstrated in various materials, yet reports on room-temperature NLAHE are still limited. In this work, we report the observation of the third-order NLAHE in ferromagnetic metal Fe3GaTe2. The third-order NLAHE shows hysteretic behavior with the variation of magnetic field, where the coercive field is the same as that of the anomalous Hall effect, and the third-order NLAHE remains observable up to the Curie temperature (~350 K). The scaling analysis suggests that the third-order NLAHE may be attributed to the Berry curvature quadrupole. Our work not only provides an approach to study magnetic materials through nonlinear electric transports, but also opens up possibilities for the future development of room-temperature third-order nonlinear electronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了在铁磁金属Fe₃GaTe₂中观测到的室温三阶非线性反常霍尔效应，该效应源于贝里曲率四极矩，并持续到居里温度(~350 K)。
AI.motivation: 尽管非线性反常霍尔效应已在多种材料中实现，但室温下的非线性反常霍尔效应研究仍然有限，亟需探索可在室温下工作的材料体系。
AI.method: 在铁磁金属Fe₃GaTe₂中进行三阶非线性反常霍尔效应的电输运测量，通过磁场变化观察其磁滞行为，并进行标度分析以确定其物理起源。
AI.result: 成功观测到三阶非线性反常霍尔效应，其矫顽场与反常霍尔效应一致，效应可持续至居里温度(~350 K)；标度分析表明该效应可能源于贝里曲率四极矩。
AI.conclusion: 该工作不仅提供了一种通过非线性电输运研究磁性材料的方法，也为未来开发室温三阶非线性电子器件开辟了可能性。

title: Tailoring Germanium Heterostructures for Quantum Devices with Machine Learning
summary: Germanium (Ge) quantum wells are emerging as versatile platforms for quantum devices, supporting high-quality spin qubits and integration with superconducting leads. These applications benefit from strong intrinsic spin-orbit interaction (SOI), enabling efficient electrical control and engineering of spin degrees of freedom. The most advanced Ge/SiGe heterostructures to date, based on compressively strained Ge channels within strain-relaxed silicon-germanium (SiGe) barriers, exhibit weak SOI due to the heavy-hole character of the wave function, posing challenges for spin-based quantum devices and requiring complex device designs for fast qubit manipulation. In this work, we demonstrate that concrete heterostructure modifications can overcome these limitations, enhancing SOI by up to three orders of magnitude. Specifically, we propose to enrich unstrained Ge channels by localized, strained silicon spikes. Leveraging a multi-objective Bayesian optimization, we optimize the spike profile to maximize SOI, while ensuring compatibility with current epitaxial growth processes and robustness against realistic variations of growth parameters. Our heterostructure substantially enhances device performance, yielding up to two orders of magnitude higher quantum-dot spin qubit quality factors than state-of-the-art materials. We also predict GHz-scale spin splittings for hybrid superconducting Andreev spin qubits. These novel Ge heterostructures with engineered Si concentration profiles can open pathways to scalable quantum and spintronic applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过在无应变Ge量子阱中引入局域应变硅尖峰，并结合多目标贝叶斯优化，将自旋轨道耦合强度提升三个数量级，使量子点自旋量子比特品质因子提升两个数量级，并预测了GHz量级的Andreev自旋分裂。
AI.motivation: 现有压缩应变Ge/SiGe异质结中重空穴波函数导致自旋轨道耦合太弱，限制了自旋量子比特的快速操控，需要复杂的器件设计。
AI.method: 提出在无应变Ge沟道中引入局域应变硅尖峰（Si spikes）来增强SOI，并使用多目标贝叶斯优化算法优化尖峰剖面，兼顾SOI最大化、外延生长兼容性和生长参数鲁棒性。
AI.result: SOI提升高达三个数量级；量子点自旋量子比特品质因子相比现有材料提升两个数量级；预测混合超导Andreev自旋量子比特达到GHz量级自旋分裂。
AI.conclusion: 这种通过调控Si浓度剖面设计的新型Ge异质结构为可扩展量子计算和自旋电子学应用开辟了新路径。

title: Nearly Complete Charge--Spin Conversion via Strain-Eliminated Fermi Pockets in a $d$-Wave Altermagnet
summary: The room-temperature altermagnet \mathrm{KV_2Se_2O} possesses nearly orthogonal flat Fermi surfaces, which in an idealized $d$-wave limit enable complete spin-channel separation and a theoretical charge-to-spin conversion efficiency (CSE) of 100%. Realistic samples, however, host residual elliptical Fermi pockets that enhance charge conductivity while suppressing spin conductivity, drastically reducing the CSE. Here we show that in-plane equibiaxial tensile strain systematically eliminates these parasitic pockets, restoring the flat-band geometry. Our first-principles calculations reveal that the CSE increases monotonically with strain, reaching a record value of approximately 96% at 4% strain. An effective tight-binding model fitted to the computed band structure accurately captures the evolution of the Fermi surface and confirms that the suppression of the pockets -- governed by reduced next-nearest-neighbor hoppings -- is the dominant mechanism for the strain-enhanced CSE. We further identify an unconventional out-of-plane spin current that emerges under tilted electric fields and achieves a CSE of nearly 55% at optimal orientations, offering a promising pathway for field-free perpendicular magnetization switching. Our work establishes strain engineering as a practical route to approach the ultimate conversion limit in altermagnets and provides a design principle for high-efficiency spintronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算表明，在室温交变磁体KV₂Se₂O中施加4%的面内等双轴拉伸应变，可将电荷-自旋转换效率（CSE）提升至约96%，接近理论极限100%。该机制源于应变消除了寄生椭圆费米口袋，恢复了近乎正交的平板费米面结构。研究还发现了倾斜电场下的非常规面外自旋电流，可实现约55%的CSE，为无场垂直磁化翻转提供了新路径。
AI.motivation: 尽管KV₂Se₂O在理想d波极限下理论CSE可达100%，但实际样品中残留的椭圆费米口袋增强了电荷电导率同时抑制了自旋电导率，导致CSE大幅降低。如何消除这些寄生口袋以恢复接近理想的转换效率是核心问题。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算，系统研究面内等双轴拉伸应变对KV₂Se₂O电子结构的影响；构建有效紧束缚模型拟合计算能带，分析费米面演化；通过应变调控最近邻和次近邻跳跃积分的变化，揭示CSE增强的微观机制。
AI.result: CSE随应变单调增加，4%应变下达到约96%的创纪录值；紧束缚模型证实次近邻跳跃积分的减小导致寄生口袋被抑制，这是CSE增强的主导机制；倾斜电场下可产生面外自旋电流，最佳取向时CSE约55%。
AI.conclusion: 应变工程是逼近交变磁体中转换极限的实用途径，为高效自旋电子器件提供了设计原理。

title: Single-crystal growth and magnetic, magnetoelectric, and optical properties of ferroaxial-type SrMn$_2$Ni$_6$Te$_3$O$_{18}$
summary: Single crystals of SrMn$_2$Ni$_6$Te$_3$O$_{18}$, a member of the ferroaxial-type magnetic oxide family $AB_{2}C_{6}$Te$_3$O$_{18}$ ($A$ = Pb, Sr; $B$ = Mn, Cd; $C$ = Ni, Co), have been successfully grown, and their structural, magnetic, magnetoelectric, and optical properties have been systematically studied. Imaging of the spatial distribution of electric-field-induced optical rotation reveals that the single crystals preferentially form single ferroaxial (FA) domains. Magnetization and neutron diffraction measurements show that Mn$^{2+}$ and Ni$^{2+}$ magnetic moments order antiferromagnetically at $T_{\rm N}$ = 83 K, forming a $c$-axis collinear bidirector-type antiferromagnetic structure. All independent magnetoelectric tensor components allowed by the magnetic point group 6/$m^{\prime}$ have been detected, and the $χ_{33}$ component exhibits a pronounced temperature-dependent anomaly, including a peak and a sign reversal. Preferential formation of single FA domains and a similar $χ_{33}$ anomaly are also observed in the isostructural compound PbMn$_2$Ni$_6$Te$_3$O$_{18}$. These findings suggest that the ferroaxial and magnetic characteristics within this structural framework are robust against Sr-Pb replacement.

AI.tldr: 本研究成功生长了铁轴性氧化物家族SrMn₂Ni₆Te₃O₁₈单晶，系统研究了其结构、磁性、磁电和光学性质。晶体优先形成单铁轴(FA)域，Mn²⁺和Ni²⁺在83 K下形成c轴共线双指向型反铁磁序。检测到所有磁电张量分量，其中χ₃₃分量表现出包括峰值和符号反转的显著温度依赖性异常。同构化合物PbMn₂Ni₆Te₃O₁₈也观察到类似现象，表明该结构框架中的铁轴性和磁性特征对Sr-Pb替换具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 探索铁轴性氧化物家族AB₂C₆Te₃O₁₈的物理性质，研究其单晶生长、铁轴性、磁电效应等特性，并考察阳离子替换（Sr-Pb）对物性的影响。
AI.method: 成功生长SrMn₂Ni₆Te₃O₁₈单晶；利用电场诱导光学旋转成像研究铁轴畴分布；使用磁化率和中子衍射测量确定磁结构；系统测量磁电张量分量。
AI.result: 单晶优先形成单铁轴(FA)域；Mn²⁺和Ni²⁺在TN=83 K反铁磁有序，形成c轴共线双指向型结构；检测到磁点群6/m'允许的所有独立磁电张量分量；χ₃₃分量显示峰值和符号反转的温度异常；同构Pb化合物表现出类似行为。
AI.conclusion: 铁轴性和磁性特性在该结构框架中对Sr-Pb阳离子替换具有鲁棒性，为铁轴性材料的应用提供了重要参考。

title: Navigating Order-(Dis)Order Family Trees via Group-Subgroup Transitions
summary: As closed-loop materials discovery systems scale to produce millions of candidate compounds, the credibility of the novelty they reward becomes a critical concern. Novelty is commonly assessed against databases of ordered crystal structures, in which atomic sites are fully occupied. Yet, a predicted ordered structure may simply correspond to a particular ordering of a known disordered phase, whose sites are occupied by multiple species in the statistical average structure; we refer to such a structure as an ordered child of a disordered parent. Here, we introduce order-(dis)order family trees, a symmetry-based framework that organizes ordered and disordered structures through group-subgroup relations and enables novelty to be explicitly evaluated. We develop a high-throughput family matching procedure, to identify possible disordered parents and symmetry-related ordered relatives for a given ordered structure. As validation, we test our framework on synthesis-facing case studies (A-Lab), where it correctly recovers existing disordered parents for the targeted ordered structures. Extending this family-tree-based benchmark to experimental structure databases (ICSD), computational datasets (MP-20, Alex-MP-20, and GNoME), and crystal generative models further reveals that many ordered structures that appear novel as individual entries are, in fact, better understood as members of experimentally known order-(dis)order family trees. We also show that this is particularly evident in symmetry-agnostic all-atom generative models, which more frequently produce ordered structures derived from known disordered parents, whereas symmetry-constrained models are 2-4x less prone to this behavior. Our results establish order-(dis)order family trees as a key requirement for achieving genuine novelty in data-driven materials discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对称性的"有序-无序家族树"框架，通过群-子群关系组织有序和无序结构，用于评估材料发现中的真正新颖性，并揭示了许多看似新颖的有序结构实际上源自已知的无序母相。
AI.motivation: 随着闭环材料发现系统规模化产生数百万候选化合物，其奖励的新颖性可信度成为关键问题。传统上，新颖性评估基于有序晶体结构数据库，但一个预测的有序结构可能只是已知无序相的特定有序排列（有序子代），这使得新颖性评估存在根本缺陷。
AI.method: 提出基于群-子群关系的对称性框架（有序-无序家族树），开发高通量家族匹配程序，识别给定有序结构的可能无序母相和对称性相关的有序亲属。在A-Lab、ICSD、MP-20、Alex-MP-20、GNoME等数据集和晶体生成模型上进行验证。
AI.result: 该框架正确恢复了目标有序结构的已知无序母相；许多看似新颖的有序结构实际上是已知有序-无序家族树的成员；对称性无关的全原子生成模型更频繁产生源自已知无序母相的有序结构，而对称性约束模型的发生率低2-4倍。
AI.conclusion: 有序-无序家族树是实现数据驱动材料发现中真正新颖性的关键要求。

title: Bismuth Films on EuO(111) as a Platform for Proximity-Induced Topological States
summary: Interfacing two-dimensional bismuth with a magnetic layer provides a promising route towards realizing higher-order topological phases. In particular, bismuthene on a ferromagnetic insulator substrate has been theoretically proposed by \citet{Chen2020} as a universal platform for magnetic second-order topological insulators. Here, we report the experimental realization of epitaxial bismuth films grown on the ferromagnetic insulator EuO(111). Using high-resolution scanning tunneling microscopy, we observe atomically ordered bi-layer bismuth with a (012)-oriented quasi-square lattice, corresponding to a stabilized $α$-phase bismuthene. The resulting film is exceptionally flat compared to conventional metallic films, reflecting the intrinsic two-dimensional nature of the Bi(012) phase. Tunneling spectroscopy(STS) reveals a robust energy gap of about 400 meV in the local density of states, consistent with a quantum spin Hall insulating phase persisting up to room temperature. Spatially resolved STS further identifies enhanced edge-localised states at the island boundaries. Complementary low-temperature magnetotransport measurements on proximity-coupled ultrathin Bi films exhibit linear magnetoresistance and a Hall sign reversal, indicative of quantum-confinement-driven surface-dominated transport. Our results establish bismuthene-magnetic-insulator heterostructures as a viable experimental platform for realizing magnetically tunable topological phases, providing a critical step toward the observation of higher-order topology in two dimensions.

AI.tldr: 本文在铁磁绝缘体EuO(111)上成功外延生长出(012)取向的准方晶格α相铋烯薄膜，通过STM观察到原子级平整的二维结构，STS揭示了约400 meV的鲁棒能隙（室温量子自旋霍尔绝缘相），并在岛边界发现了增强的边缘态；低温磁输运测量显示出线性磁电阻和霍尔符号反转，证实了量子限制驱动的表面主导输运，建立了铋烯-磁绝缘体异质结构作为实现可磁调控拓扑相的实验平台。
AI.motivation: 理论上预测铋烯/铁磁绝缘体衬底是实现磁性二阶拓扑绝缘体的通用平台，但实验上尚未实现。本文旨在通过实验生长和表征该异质结构，验证其作为高阶拓扑相实验平台的可行性。
AI.method: 在铁磁绝缘体EuO(111)上通过外延生长制备铋薄膜，利用高分辨扫描隧道显微镜(STM)表征原子级形貌，采用隧穿谱(STS)测量局域态密度和边缘态，结合低温磁输运测量研究量子输运性质。
AI.result: 成功制备了(012)取向的准方晶格α相铋烯薄膜，具有原子级平整度；观察到约400 meV的鲁棒能隙（室温下仍存在）；岛边界处存在增强的边缘局域态；低温磁输运显示线性磁电阻和霍尔符号反转，表明表面主导的量子限制输运。
AI.conclusion: 铋烯-磁绝缘体异质结构是可行的实验平台，可用于实现可磁调控的拓扑相，为在二维体系中观测高阶拓扑绝缘体提供了关键实验进展。

title: Identifying Oriented Spin Space Groups and Related Physical Properties Using an Online Platform FINDSPINGROUP
summary: Unconventional magnets that combine antiferromagnetic structures with ferromagnetic-like responses are essential for the development of next-generation spintronics. Their emergent properties are fundamentally dictated by the interplay between exchange-driven magnetic geometry and spin-orbit coupling, which are described by spin space group (SSG) and magnetic space group (MSG) frameworks, respectively. However, the lack of direct correspondence between these frameworks, developed in different eras, hinders the systematic tracking of symmetry evolution of these intertwined physical contributions. In this work, we introduce FINDSPINGROUP, a computational architecture that implements the recently emerged, oriented spin space group framework to unify SSG and MSG descriptions. By automating the tracking of symmetry-breaking pathways from the non-relativistic to the relativistic limit, this online platform enables the classification of magnetic phases and the derivation of symmetry-constrained tensors for phenomena such as momentum-dependent spin splitting and the anomalous Hall effect. By standardizing data exchange through the spin crystallographic information file, this architecture establishes a computational infrastructure for the high-throughput discovery and design of unconventional magnets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了FINDSPINGROUP计算架构，通过统一的旋量空间群框架自动追踪从非相对论到相对论极限的对称性演化路径，为非常规磁体的高通量发现和设计提供了计算基础设施。
AI.motivation: 反铁磁结构与铁磁响应结合的非常规磁体对下一代自旋电子学至关重要，但描述交换驱动磁几何的旋量空间群(SSG)与描述自旋轨道耦合的磁空间群(MSG)之间缺乏直接对应关系，阻碍了对这些交织物理贡献的对称性演化进行系统追踪。
AI.method: 提出FINDSPINGROUP计算架构，实现定向旋量空间群框架，统一SSG和MSG描述；自动化追踪从非相对论到相对论极限的对称性破缺路径；通过自旋晶体学信息文件标准化数据交换。
AI.result: 该在线平台能够对磁相进行分类，推导对称性约束的张量（如动量依赖的自旋分裂和反常霍尔效应），建立高通量发现和设计非常规磁体的计算基础设施。
AI.conclusion: FINDSPINGROUP通过统一对称性框架，为非常规磁体的系统分类和功能预测提供了计算工具，有望加速自旋电子学材料的发现与设计。

title: Cryogenic shock exfoliation for ultrahigh mobility rhombohedral graphite nanoelectronics
summary: Rhombohedral multilayer graphene (RMG) offers a highly tunable platform for correlated electron physics, featuring field-effect control of magnetic, superconducting, and topological phases[1-24]. The promise of these materials has been held back by the limited abundance of rhombohedral stacking in natural graphite, which constrains both sample yield and useful area. Here we introduce 'cryogenic shock exfoliation' to produce large area rhombohedral graphene flakes which, combined with a low-pressure van der Waals assembly technique that preserves stacking order, enable highly uniform devices exceeding 1300 $μm^2$ with fabrication yields of 90%. Using scanning nanoSQUID-on-tip imaging, we demonstrate uniform spin magnetism over the full central 10 times 10 $μm^2$ area of our devices. Transverse magnetic focusing reveals a disorder mean free path exceeding 200 $μm$ at low temperatures. Within the flat surface bands of RMG[20], we observe a size-driven crossover from Poiseuille to porous electron flow in the intermediate-temperature regime of strong electron-electron hydrodynamics[16, 25], providing a further signature of ultrahigh device quality. Our approach overcomes a key materials bottleneck in the fabrication of mesoscopic rhombohedral graphene devices, paving the way for incorporating strongly correlated phases into two-dimensional nanoelectronics.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种名为"低温冲击剥离"的新方法，能够大规模制备高质量菱方多层石墨烯（RMG）薄片，结合低压范德华组装技术，实现了面积超过1300 μm²、制备良率高达90%的均匀器件。通过扫描纳米SQUID成像和横向磁聚焦等技术，验证了器件具有均匀的自旋磁性、超过200 μm的 disorder 平均自由程以及超高质量。研究还观察到在平坦表面带中由尺寸驱动的从泊肃叶流到多孔电子流的交叉现象，为强电子-电子流体动力学提供了证据。
AI.motivation: 菱方多层石墨烯（RMG）具有丰富的可调谐关联电子物理特性（如磁性、超导和拓扑相），但天然石墨中菱方堆叠的丰度极低，限制了样品产量和可用面积，成为该领域的关键材料瓶颈。
AI.method: 1) 提出"低温冲击剥离"技术，用于制备大面积菱方石墨烯薄片；2) 结合低压范德华组装技术，保持堆叠顺序；3) 使用扫描纳米SQUID-on-tip成像技术表征自旋磁性；4) 通过横向磁聚焦测量 disorder 平均自由程；5) 在平坦表面带中研究电子流体动力学行为。
AI.result: 成功制备面积超过1300 μm²、良率90%的高度均匀RMG器件；展示均匀的自旋磁性；disorder 平均自由程超过200 μm；观察到从泊肃叶流到多孔电子流的尺寸驱动交叉现象。
AI.conclusion: 该方法克服了菱方石墨烯介观器件制备中的关键材料瓶颈，为将强关联相集成到二维纳米电子学中铺平了道路。

title: GEWUM: General Exploration Workflow for the Utopia of Materials: A Unified Platform for Automated Structure Generation, Selection, and Validation
summary: The discovery of materials with tailored properties is increasingly reliant on computational methods. However, the fragmented landscape of existing software often hinders the seamless integration of large-scale structure prediction with rigorous stability validation, particularly in high-performance computing (HPC) environments. To address this gap, we present GEWUM (General Exploration Workflow for the Utopia of Materials), a unified, open-source platform designed to automate and accelerate materials discovery. GEWUM integrates the Selective Random Structure Search (SRSS) strategy with universal Machine Learning Interatomic Potentials (uMLIPs), enabling efficient exploration of vast chemical spaces. Its core architecture features a modular design with native support for SLURM-based HPC clusters. The platform unifies the entire workflow, from random structure generation and diversity-preserving selection to thermodynamic and dynamic stability assessments, as well as advanced property calculations (e.g., elastic constants, thermal conductivity, and quasi-harmonic approximations). We demonstrate GEWUM's capabilities through three distinct case studies: (1) the prediction of low-energy polymorphs in the complex Al-Sc-N nitride system; (2) the identification of a P-62c phase of U3Si5, distinct from the known AlB2 type; and (3) the high-pressure structure prediction of ThH10 at 150 GPa. Furthermore, benchmark tests show reasonable agreement in predicting thermophysical properties. By bridging the gap between uMLIPs and automated high-throughput workflows, GEWUM serves as a valuable framework to facilitate efficient and scalable materials exploration.

AI.tldr: GEWUM是一个开源统一平台，集成随机结构搜索与通用机器学习原子间势，实现从结构生成到稳定性验证及物性计算的全流程自动化材料发现，并通过三个案例展示了其预测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有材料发现软件碎片化，难以在大规模结构预测与严格稳定性验证之间实现无缝集成，尤其在高性能计算环境中缺乏统一平台。
AI.method: 提出GEWUM平台，核心架构采用模块化设计，集成选择性随机结构搜索（SRSS）策略与通用机器学习原子间势（uMLIPs），原生支持SLURM-based HPC集群，覆盖随机结构生成、多样性保持选择、热力学/动力学稳定性评估及先进物性计算（弹性常数、热导率、准谐近似）全流程。
AI.result: 通过三个案例验证：1) 预测Al-Sc-N氮化物体系低能多晶型；2) 发现U3Si5的P-62c相（不同于已知AlB2型）；3) 150 GPa下ThH10的高压结构预测。基准测试显示热物理性质预测与已知结果合理一致。
AI.conclusion: GEWUM弥合了通用机器学习原子间势与自动化高通量工作流之间的鸿沟，为高效可扩展的材料探索提供了有价值的框架。

title: Emergence of a non-bulk hexagonal Fe$_2$S$_2$ single layer via phase transformation
summary: Two-dimensional materials can stabilize crystal structures that are absent from their bulk counterparts, offering opportunities for materials design. Here, we report the synthesis of a previously unknown hexagonal Fe$_2$S$_2$ single layer with $β$-CuI structure, a buckled layer of two vertically stacked FeS honeycomb lattices, realized by thermally induced transformation of single layer mackinawite grown on graphene/Ir(111). In situ scanning tunneling microscopy and low-energy electron diffraction reveal a transition from a tetragonal to a hexagonal lattice accompanied by distinct morphological and electronic signatures. The hexagonal Fe$_2$S$_2$ forms reproducibly upon annealing and represents a new structural motif within the Fe-S material family. First-principles calculations identify the $β$-CuI structure as most consistent with experiment. The calculations suggest that on-site Coulomb interactions and magnetic order are relevant to understanding the stability of the new 2D Fe-S compound. The preferred nucleation of single-layer mackinawite, despite being energetically disfavored, is speculated to result from its low edge energy, analogous to the 3D case. Our results establish Fe$_2$S$_2$ as a platform for exploring structural polymorphism in two dimensions and demonstrate that reduced dimensionality can stabilize crystal structures not accessible in bulk materials.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了通过热诱导单层马基诺矿（FeS）在石墨烯/Ir(111)上转变，合成了一种新型六方Fe₂S₂单层结构（β-CuI型），该结构是两层垂直堆叠的FeS六方蜂窝晶格组成的褶皱层，在三维材料中不存在。原位STM和LEED证实了从四方到六方晶格的转变，第一性原理计算表明其稳定性与库仑相互作用和磁序有关。
AI.motivation: 探索二维材料如何稳定其三维体相中不存在的晶体结构，寻找Fe-S材料体系中的新结构基元。
AI.method: 通过热诱导单层马基诺矿（四方结构）在石墨烯/Ir(111)衬底上转变为六方Fe₂S₂；利用原位扫描隧道显微镜(STM)和低能电子衍射(LEED)表征结构转变；结合第一性原理计算分析稳定性和电子性质。
AI.result: 成功合成具有β-CuI结构的新型六方Fe₂S₂单层；观察到从四方到六方晶格的明显转变，伴有独特的形态和电子特征；计算表明β-CuI结构与实验最吻合，库仑相互作用和磁序对稳定性至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 证明了降维可以稳定体相中无法获得的晶体结构；Fe₂S₂为探索二维结构多态性提供了新的平台；单层马基诺矿的优先成核可能源于其低边缘能。

title: Neural surrogates for crystal growth dynamics with variable supersaturation: explicit vs. implicit conditioning
summary: Simulations of crystal growth are performed by using Convolutional Recurrent Neural Network surrogate models, trained on a dataset of time sequences computed by numerical integration of Allen-Cahn dynamics including faceting via kinetic anisotropy. Two network architectures are developed to take into account the effects of a variable supersaturation value. The first infers it implicitly by processing an input mini-sequence of a few evolution frames and then returns a consistent continuation of the evolution. The second takes the supersaturation parameter as an explicit input along with a single initial frame and predicts the entire sequence. The two models are systematically tested to establish strengths and weaknesses, comparing the prediction performance for models trained on datasets of different size and, in the first architecture, different lengths of input mini-sequence. The analysis of point-wise and mean absolute errors shows how the explicit parameter conditioning guarantees the best results, reproducing with high-fidelity the ground-truth profiles. Comparable results are achievable by the mini-sequence approach only when using larger training datasets. The trained models show strong conditioning by the supersaturation parameter, consistently reproducing its overall impact on growth rates as well as its local effect on the faceted morphology. Moreover, they are perfectly scalable even on 256 times larger domains and can be successfully extended to more than 10 times longer sequences with limited error accumulation. The analysis highlights the potential and limits of these approaches in view of their general exploitation for crystal growth simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文使用卷积递归神经网络代理模型模拟晶体生长，对比了隐式推断和显式参数输入的两种架构，发现显式参数条件化模型性能最优。
AI.motivation: 传统数值积分模拟晶体生长计算成本高，亟需高效的代理模型来加速模拟过程。
AI.method: 采用卷积递归神经网络（ConvRNN）作为代理模型，开发了两种架构：1）隐式推断超饱和度（输入短时序列推断后续演化）；2）显式将超饱和度作为输入参数（结合初始帧预测完整序列）。
AI.result: 显式参数条件化模型在点误差和平均绝对误差上表现最佳，高 fidelity 再现真实曲线；隐式方法需更大训练集才能达到可比效果。两种模型均可扩展到256倍大域和10倍长序列。
AI.conclusion: 显式参数条件化架构更适合晶体生长模拟，具有良好的可扩展性和低误差累积，但需注意隐式方法的训练数据需求。

title: Electronic and Vibrational Properties of On-Surface Synthesized Gulf-Edged Chiral Graphene Nanoribbons
summary: On-surface synthesis enables the fabrication of graphene nanoribbons (GNRs) with atomic precision, allowing their electronic, optical, and magnetic properties to be tuned by engineering edge structure and width. Progress on the synthesis of chiral GNRs has nevertheless remained limited, largely because existing precursor designs rely on laterally fused acene units and cannot access edge topologies beyond armchair and zigzag. Here, we introduce a new on-surface synthesis motif that yields a gulf-edged chiral GNR. The growth steps are monitored by scanning probe microscopy, and the atomic structure is confirmed by non-contact atomic force microscopy. Scanning tunneling spectroscopy combined with theoretical simulations identifies the gulf-edged chiral GNR as a closed-shell semiconductor with a bandgap of 1.8 eV. Raman spectroscopy reveals vibrational properties, including a distinctive mode that may serve as a fingerprint for chiral GNRs. The Raman analysis further uncovers ambient instability despite the large bandgap and non-spin-polarized edges, consistent with prior reports linking GNR stability to zigzag edge features. This work establishes a rationally designed synthesis motif for chiral GNRs and provides a combined structural, electronic, and vibrational characterization, offering guidelines for future synthesis strategies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的湾边手性石墨烯纳米带（GNR）的表面上合成策略，并通过扫描探针显微镜、非接触原子力显微镜、扫描隧道光谱和拉曼光谱等手段对其结构、电子和振动性质进行了全面表征，发现其为带隙1.8 eV的闭壳半导体，并揭示了其环境不稳定性与锯齿边缘特征相关。
AI.motivation: 现有手性GNR的合成方法受限于前驱体设计，仅能依赖横向并苯单元，无法实现除扶手椅和锯齿形以外的边缘拓扑结构，因此亟需开发新的合成策略来拓展手性GNR的边缘结构多样性。
AI.method: 采用新型表面上合成基元，制备湾边手性GNR；利用扫描探针显微镜监测生长过程；通过非接触原子力显微镜确认原子结构；使用扫描隧道光谱结合理论模拟表征电子结构；采用拉曼光谱分析振动性质。
AI.result: 成功合成湾边手性GNR，为闭壳半导体，带隙1.8 eV；拉曼光谱发现特征振动模式可作为手性GNR的指纹信号；该GNR虽具有大带隙且无自旋极化边缘，但仍表现出环境不稳定性，与GNR稳定性与锯齿边缘特征相关的先前报道一致。
AI.conclusion: 建立了手性GNR的理性设计合成策略，提供了结构、电子和振动的联合表征，为未来手性GNR的合成方案提供了指导原则。

title: Self-consistent evaluation of the Berry connection for Wannier functions
summary: The Berry connection is a gauge-dependent quantity frequently used to describe the optical response of solids. Its evaluation requires a k-derivative with respect to the cell periodic-part of the Bloch-functions and is commonly calculated in the Wannier basis by using overlap matrices of cell-periodic parts of Bloch-functions at neighboring k-points. So far, all proposed interpolation schemes for the Berry connection do not account for the matrix structure of the overlap matrices explicitly but treat the matrix elements as independent, or only distinguish between diagonal and off-diagonal entries. In this work, we propose a self-consistent interpolation scheme based on the matrix logarithm resulting in a strongly improved accuracy. Furthermore, we discuss how the basis set incompleteness of the bands used in the ab-initio calculation imposes constraints on the accuracy. We quantify the basis incompleteness based on the singular values of the overlap matrices and relate it to the invariant part of the spread functional $Ω_\mathrm{I}$ of the Wannier functions. Numerical calculations for monolayer MoS2 and bulk Si demonstrate that the proposed interpolation scheme is much less sensitive to the Wannierization details and leads to an improved quality of the velocity matrix and the optical conductivity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于矩阵对数的自洽插值方案，用于改进Berry连接的Wannier插值精度，并在MoS2单层和体相硅中验证了其相较于传统方法的优越性。
AI.motivation: 现有Berry连接插值方案未显式考虑重叠矩阵的矩阵结构，将矩阵元视为独立或仅区分对角/非对角项，导致精度受限。
AI.method: 提出基于矩阵对数的自洽插值方案，利用重叠矩阵的奇异值量化基组不完备性，并将其与Wannier函数扩展泛函的不变部分Ω_I相关联。
AI.result: 在单层MoS2和体相Si的数值计算中，该方案对Wannier化细节的敏感性显著降低，速度矩阵和光学导纳的质量得到提升。
AI.conclusion: 基于矩阵对数的插值方案能有效克服现有方法的精度瓶颈，为Berry连接的准确计算提供了更稳健的途径。

title: Nickel intercalation in epitaxial graphene on SiC(0001): a novel platform for engineering two-dimensional heterostructures
summary: Two-dimensional (2D) magnetic materials integrated with graphene offer a compelling platform for next-generation spintronic devices, yet nickel in its 2D form remains largely unexplored, due to fundamental synthesis limitations. Here, we report the controlled intercalation of Ni beneath epitaxial graphene on the Si-face of SiC(0001), achieved through a scalable colloidal nanoparticle deposition route. Chemically synthesized Ni nanoparticles (~10 nm diameter) are uniformly deposited onto graphene via immersion in colloidal solution at room temperature; subsequent thermal annealing at 650 °C drives intercalation, yielding well-ordered Ni islands at the graphene/buffer-layer interface with morphology dictated by annealing conditions. Scanning tunneling microscopy (STM) and angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES), supported by density functional theory (DFT) calculations, elucidate the atomic and electronic structure of the intercalated layers. DFT simulations further confirm the thermodynamic stability of the 2D nanostructures as a function of shape and lateral size, predicting a robust average magnetic moment of 0.9 $μ_B$ per atom. The resulting Ni-intercalated graphene on SiC constitutes a well-defined 2D heterostructure combining preserved graphene band structure with robust interfacial magnetism, stable under ambient conditions. These findings establish a reproducible, scalable pathway to engineer magnetic graphene-based heterostructures and open new avenues for their integration into spintronic architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一种通过胶体纳米颗粒沉积结合热退火的方法，在SiC衬底上外延石墨烯下方实现Ni的可控插层，构建了具有稳定界面磁性的二维石墨烯基异质结构。
AI.motivation: 二维磁性材料与石墨烯集成是下一代自旋电子器件的理想平台，但二维Ni因其合成困难而鲜少被探索，现有方法缺乏可扩展性。
AI.method: 采用化学合成的Ni纳米颗粒（~10 nm）在室温下通过胶体溶液浸渍均匀沉积于石墨烯表面，随后在650°C退火驱动Ni插层至石墨烯/缓冲层界面；利用STM、ARPES结合DFT计算表征结构与磁性。
AI.result: 成功实现Ni在石墨烯下方的可控插层，形成有序Ni岛结构；DFT预测其具有约0.9 μB/原子的平均磁矩；石墨烯能带结构得以保持，异质结构在环境条件下稳定。
AI.conclusion: 建立了一条可重复、可扩展的磁性石墨烯异质结构工程路径，为自旋电子器件的集成应用开辟了新方向。

title: Amorphous Nanoconfinement Enables Self-sustaining Sabatier Reaction at Ambient Conditions
summary: The Sabatier reaction, the catalytic hydrogenation of CO2 into CH4, offers a cornerstone for carbon capture and utilization, and in-situ resource utilization during space exploration; however, it faces a fundamental thermodynamic-kinetic paradox: although highly exothermic, conventional catalysts still require continuous external heating to activate CO2 and maintain stable operation. Here we report an amorphous silica-embedded ruthenium catalyst that enables a long-term self-sustaining autothermal Sabatier reaction dispensing with external energy supply. Operating under ambient conditions, this system achieves a record-high CH4 yield of 0.50 mol gcat-1 h-1 with 100% selectivity, stable operation for over 2,000 hours, and a record-low catalyst bed temperature down to 100 oC. This exceptional self-sustaining behavior stems from the synergistic effect of the catalyst's ultralow effective thermal conductivity (0.27 W m-1 K-1), induced by amorphous nanoconfinement, and its superior intrinsic activity. This synergy generates localized hot spots at Ru sites while suppressing macroscopic heat loss. In situ measurements further reveal CH4 formation even at 54 oC and identify a *CO-mediated pathway for CO2 methanation. The reaction ignites readily with a lighter or focused sunlight and persists even under forced convection from an electric fan, demonstrating strong environmental tolerance. By removing the need for constant energy input, this "ignite-and-forget" system paves the way for decentralized Power-to-Gas systems and autonomous fuel production in resource-constrained environments like Mars.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一种无定形二氧化硅包覆的钌催化剂，可在无需外部供能的条件下实现自持的Sabatier反应（CO2加氢甲烷化），达到创纪录的0.50 mol gcat-1 h-1的CH4产率、100%选择性、2000小时以上稳定运行，以及低至100°C的催化剂床温度，且可通过打火机或聚焦太阳光轻松点燃。
AI.motivation: Sabatier反应是CO2捕集利用和太空原位资源利用的关键反应，但其面临热力学-动力学悖论：虽然反应本身高度放热，传统催化剂仍需持续外部加热来活化CO2并维持稳定运行。因此，亟需开发一种无需外部能量输入即可自持运行的高效催化剂。
AI.method: 制备了无定形二氧化硅包覆的钌催化剂（amorphous silica-embedded ruthenium catalyst），利用无定形纳米限域效应实现超低有效热导率（0.27 W m-1 K-1），结合催化剂自身的高本征活性，在Ru位点产生局部热点同时抑制宏观热量散失，从而实现自持反应。
AI.result: CH4产率0.50 mol gcat-1 h-1，100%选择性，2000小时以上稳定运行，催化剂床温度低至100°C；检测到低至54°C即可生成CH4；证实了*CO介导的CO2甲烷化路径；反应可通过打火机或聚焦太阳光点燃，甚至在电风扇强制对流下仍能自持。
AI.conclusion: 这种"点燃即忘"（ignite-and-forget）的系统消除了对持续能量输入的需求，为去中心化的Power-to-Gas系统以及火星等资源受限环境下的自主燃料生产铺平了道路。

title: Direct observation of surface bandgap shrinkage and negative electronic compressibility in SrTiO3
summary: In this work, we investigate and compare the electronic structures of SrTiO3 and KTaO3 under ultraviolet (UV) light induced electron doping. Using angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES), the evolution of the surface electronic structures of SrTiO3 and KTaO3 is systematically examined as a function of electron density. In contrast to KTaO3, SrTiO3 exhibits a pronounced shrinking of its surface bandgap by approximately 390 meV, accompanied by a counterintuitive shift of the valence band peak toward lower binding energies of up to 200 meV with increasing electron density. This anomalous behavior constitutes a spectroscopic signature of negative electronic compressibility (NEC). Density-functional-theory calculations provide qualitative support for the experimental observations. The calculations show that surface formation already reduces the apparent near-gap separation in SrTiO3, while additional electron accumulation further drives the slab toward a more metallic state; oxygen-vacancy models likewise produce strong bandgap reduction, identifying plausible mechanisms contributing to the observed surface bandgap shrinkage. These findings establish a direct spectroscopic link between bandgap engineering and the NEC effect at the SrTiO3 surface, highlighting the potential of SrTiO3 for next-generation oxide electronic, optoelectronic, and high-performance capacitive energy storage devices applications.

AI.tldr: 本文利用ARPES实验结合DFT计算，对比研究SrTiO3和KTaO3在紫外光诱导电子掺杂下的表面电子结构演化。发现SrTiO3表面带隙显著收缩约390 meV，价带顶反常地向低结合能移动达200 meV，这一行为是负电子压缩率（NEC）的光谱特征，而KTaO3未观察到类似现象。表面形成和氧空位机制共同导致了带隙收缩，建立了带隙工程与NEC效应之间的直接光谱联系。
AI.motivation: 探究并对比SrTiO3和KTaO3在紫外光诱导电子掺杂下的表面电子结构演化，揭示SrTiO3表面特有的负电子压缩率（NEC）现象及其与带隙收缩的关联机制。
AI.method: 采用角分辨光电子能谱（ARPES）系统测量两种材料表面电子结构随电子密度的演化；结合密度泛函理论（DFT）计算进行定性验证，包括表面模型和氧空位模型。
AI.result: SrTiO3表面带隙收缩约390 meV，价带顶向低结合能移动达200 meV（KTaO3无此现象）；DFT计算表明表面形成和氧空位均可导致带隙减小，与实验定性一致。
AI.conclusion: SrTiO3表面的反常带隙收缩和价带移动是负电子压缩率（NEC）的直接光谱证据，揭示了带隙工程与NEC效应的内在联系，表明SrTiO3在氧化物电子学、光电子学及高容量电容储能器件中具有重要应用潜力。

title: Optical nonlinear anomalous Hall effect reveals the hidden spin order in antiferromagnets
comment: v1: preprint; licence: CC BY 4.0, supplementary material is a part of this submission
summary: Reading antiferromagnetic order remains a central obstacle for antiferromagnetic memory and logic because zero net magnetisation precludes conventional magnetic readout. Domain imaging typically relies on x-ray magnetic linear dichroism (XMLD) microscopy at synchrotron sources, but XMLD is even under time reversal and cannot distinguish 180°-reversed magnetic states. Here we report the first experimental observation of the optical nonlinear anomalous Hall effect, predicted for antiferromagnets with combined parity - time-reversal ($PT$) symmetry. The effect stems from light-induced interband electric-dipole transitions, where spin-orbit coupling induces an asymmetry between $\pm k$ states and generates a time-reversal-odd photocurrent whose sign flips upon 180° reversal of the Néel vector. In $PT$-symmetric CuMnAs, we use near-field excitation to map this photocurrent with sub-100-nm spatial resolution after current-induced spin-orbit-torque switching. The signal polarity follows local Néel vector reversal, enabling nanoscale imaging of antiferromagnetic texture and direct readout of 180°-reversed antiferromagnetic states that remain indistinguishable in XMLD and other time-reversal-even linear-dichroic probes. The optical nonlinear anomalous Hall effect thus reveals a new light-spin interaction and provides a scalable route to nanoscale readout of hidden spin order, with potential for ultrafast all-electrical and all-optical antiferromagnetic spintronic technologies.

AI.tldr: 本文首次实验观测到光学非线性反常霍尔效应，该效应可在PT对称的反铁磁材料CuMnAs中实现180°反铁磁态的纳米级成像和读出，解决了传统XMLD等方法无法区分时间反演偶极反铁磁序的难题。
AI.motivation: 反铁磁存储和逻辑器件的核心障碍在于无法读取反铁磁序——因净磁化为零，传统磁读出头无法工作。现有X射线磁线性二色性(XMLD)显微术虽可成像，但XMLD在时间反演下为偶，无法区分180°反转的磁态。
AI.method: 在PT对称的反铁磁CuMnAs中，利用光致带间电偶极跃迁，自旋-轨道耦合诱导±k态不对称，产生时间反演奇的光电流。通过近场激发，结合电流诱导自旋轨道矩翻转，实现亚100 nm空间分辨率的反铁磁织构成像。
AI.result: 成功观测到信号极性随局部Néel矢量反转而翻转，实现了对180°反转反铁磁态的纳米级成像和直接读出，这是XMLD等时间反演偶线性二色探针无法区分的。
AI.conclusion: 光学非线性反常霍尔效应揭示了一种新的光-自旋相互作用，为隐藏自旋序的纳米级读出提供了可扩展的方案，有望推动超快全电学和全光学反铁磁自旋电子学技术的发展。

title: Modeling High Entropy Alloys' Mechanical Property through Natural Language-Derived Descriptors
summary: Processing treatments of alloys, despite being influential to alloy properties, are often neglected in machine-learning aided alloy designs due to the difficulties in expressing this information. We investigated the expressiveness of transformer embeddings through synthesized annealing processing treatment text and verified that embeddings could be utilized to reconstruct the processing parameters of alloys effectively with an R2>0.99. We then utilized the vector representations of alloys' processing treatment descriptions as descriptors to model high-entropy alloys' hardness and achieved a 20% improvement in prediction, verifying that natural language-derived descriptors of processing treatment information could be utilized to improve prediction of alloy properties.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用自然语言处理（Transformer嵌入）将合金的加工处理信息转化为数值描述符，显著提升了高熵合金硬度预测的准确性（R²>0.99重构加工参数，预测性能提升20%）。
AI.motivation: 合金的加工处理对性能影响显著，但因其信息难以结构化表达，在机器学习辅助合金设计中常被忽略。作者希望解决加工信息难以利用的问题。
AI.method: 通过合成的退火处理文本，研究Transformer嵌入的表达能力；利用嵌入向量重构加工参数（R²>0.99），并将加工处理描述的向量表示作为描述符，用于建模高熵合金的硬度。
AI.result: 嵌入能有效重构加工参数（R²>0.99）；引入自然语言衍生描述符后，高熵合金硬度预测性能提升了20%。
AI.conclusion: 自然语言处理技术可将加工处理信息转化为有效的数值描述符，用于提升合金性能预测模型的准确性。

title: Critical role of phase-dependent properties in modeling photothermal sintering of LiCoO2 cathodes
summary: Photothermal (photonic) sintering crystallizes as-deposited amorphous LiCoO2 (LCO) cathodes for solid-state thin-film batteries using millisecond, surface-localized heating. However, process design often relies on 1D models with phase-averaged, temperature-independent properties, which can mispredict peak temperatures and thermal damage margins. Here we develop a multiscale, data-driven framework that provides phase- and grain size-resolved thermophysical inputs for stoichiometric LCO. We train an Allegro neural network potential with near-ab initio accuracy, enabling Green-Kubo calculations of thermal conductivity for crystalline and amorphous phases. The low, weakly density-dependent conductivity of amorphous LCO motivates its use as an effective intergranular phase in a thin-interface model that reproduces observed grain-size-dependent thermal transport. Combined with measured wavelength-resolved optical properties in 1D multiphysics simulations, we show amorphous LCO absorbs more strongly and reaches higher peak temperatures than crystalline LCO; thus crystalline, constant-property models systematically overestimate safe operating windows.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了一个多尺度数据驱动框架，用于精确模拟LiCoO2薄膜阴极的光热烧结过程。通过Allegro神经网络势进行Green-Kubo计算，揭示了非晶态LCO的低热导率和强光吸收特性，发现传统结晶态常数性质模型会高估安全操作窗口。
AI.motivation: 现有光热烧结工艺设计依赖一维相均化、温度无关性质模型，导致峰值温度和热损伤边界的预测不准确。
AI.method: 开发多尺度数据驱动框架：训练Allegro神经网络势以实现近从头算精度的Green-Kubo热导率计算；构建薄界面模型再现晶粒尺寸相关的热传输；结合波长分辨光学性质进行一维多物理场模拟。
AI.result: 非晶LCO热导率低且弱密度依赖；非晶LCO比晶态LCO吸收更强、峰值温度更高；传统结晶态常数性质模型会系统性地高估安全操作窗口。
AI.conclusion: 应采用相分辨、温度依赖的物性参数进行光热烧结工艺设计，以提高预测准确性并避免热损伤风险。

title: OptiMat Alloys: A FAIR End-to-End Agent with Living Database for Computational Multi-Principal Alloy Exploration
summary: The FAIR principles have transformed how computational data and workflows are shared in materials research, yet existing repositories can only serve pre-computed entries -- broad coverage is perpetually incomplete and cannot adapt to new questions on demand. To address these challenges, we present OptiMat Alloys, a large language model-powered conversational agent for multi-principal element alloy exploration built on three pillars: a living database that stores every calculation with provenance, low-barrier accessibility through a web interface requiring zero programming expertise, and built-in uncertainty quantification via cross-potential and cross-configuration validation (see demo here https://youtu.be/lQzuorkzPMc). Coupling foundational machine learning interatomic potentials covering near-all periodic table of elements with natural-language interaction, OptiMat Alloys enables targeted, on-demand computation guided by the user's domain knowledge-extending FAIR from pre-computed repositories to on-demand knowledge generation and making computational alloy screening accessible to any materials scientist.

AI.tldr: OptiMat Alloys 是一个基于大语言模型的对话式代理，通过活数据库、低门槛网页界面和内置不确定性量化三大支柱，将 FAIR 原则从预计算存储库扩展到按需知识生成，使多主元合金的计算筛选对任何材料科学家都可用。
AI.motivation: 现有材料数据仓库只能提供预计算条目，覆盖范围永远不完整，且无法按需适应新问题，这限制了 FAIR 原则在材料研究中的充分应用。
AI.method: 基于三大支柱：(1) 活数据库（记录每次计算及其来源）；(2) 零编程门槛的网页界面；(3) 通过跨势函数和跨构型验证实现内置不确定性量化。耦合覆盖近全周期表的机器学习原子间势与自然语言交互。
AI.result: 实现了目标导向的按需计算，用户可通过自然语言驱动合金探索，将 FAIR 从预计算库扩展到按需知识生成。
AI.conclusion: OptiMat Alloys 使计算合金筛选对任何材料科学家都可及，解决了传统仓库覆盖不全和无法适应新问题的根本局限。

title: Extending Hamiltonian-Adaptive Resolution Simulation to Interfaces: An Updated LAMMPS Implementation and Application to Porous Solids
summary: Many natural phenomena involve processes that happen simultaneously at different characteristic length- and timescales. Typically, the region where the process of interest happens is affected by fluctuations in its surroundings. Modeling these systems requires an effective combination of simulation resolutions. The Hamiltonian-Adaptive Resolution Simulation (H-AdResS) method allows to model dual-resolution systems in length- and time-scales compatible with molecular diffusion, by combining atomistic and particle-based coarse graining models in the same simulation box. In this work, a new implementation of H-AdResS is provided in LAMMPS 2023. New features extend the usage to more diverse interaction potentials and simplify the preparation of input files via dedicated lammps input commands, while keeping the efficiency gain of the basis method. The implementation is benchmarked by reproducing water properties from a reference atomistic simulation. Importantly, the new implementation includes changes in compensation routines allowing to simulate systems with fluctuating density. As an example, the method in its new implementation is applied to modeling a porous metal-organic framework and its gas adsorption structure and transport properties. We demonstrate that structural and dynamic properties in the atomistic region of the dual-resolution scheme are unaffected and remain those of the fully atomistic system, while increasing simulation efficiency. This paves the way for using H-AdResS to simulate complex interfaces across applications in energy storage, electrocatalysis, and membrane technologies.

AI.tldr: 本文在LAMMPS 2023中实现了H-AdResS双分辨率分子模拟方法的新版本，扩展了适用范围，支持波动密度系统，并通过多孔MOF材料的气体吸附模拟验证了其保持全原子精度同时提升效率的能力。
AI.motivation: 自然现象涉及多尺度过程，传统单分辨率模拟难以兼顾精度与效率。需要一种能在同一模拟中有效结合原子级精度与粗粒化效率的方法，以模拟受环境涨落影响的多尺度系统。
AI.method: 在LAMMPS中重新实现H-AdResS方法，扩展了支持相互作用的势函数类型，简化输入文件准备流程，并改进了补偿程序以支持密度涨落系统。通过水性质验证，并应用于多孔MOF材料的气体吸附模拟。
AI.result: 新实现成功复现了参考全原子模拟的水性质；在MOF模拟中，双分辨率方案原子区域的结构与动力学性质与全原子系统一致，同时提升了模拟效率；支持密度涨落系统是重要改进。
AI.conclusion: 新H-AdResS实现为模拟复杂界面系统（如能源存储、电催化、膜技术）提供了可行工具，在保持精度的同时提升效率。
